query:
SELECT 
  w.id,
  w.title,
  w.dateCreated,
  w.dimensions,
  w.materials,
  w.technique,
  w.series,
  p.code as phaseCode,
  p.title as phaseName,
  w.imageUrl,
  w.thumbnailUrl,
  w.isFeatured,
  w.sortOrder
FROM works w
LEFT JOIN phases p ON w.phaseId = p.id
ORDER BY w.dateCreated;
